problem_definition: Students often ask vague questions, and the team first needs a minimum AI workflow that can define how question-quality support should be built.
project_goal: Define a five-agent pipeline that can produce structured planning and design artifacts for the Question-Power Co-Learner.
target_user: Middle school students who struggle to ask clear and useful questions.
mvp_scope: Produce structured outputs for each agent.
Support one sequential end-to-end artifact generation flow.
user_flow: Clarify the project purpose and current stage.
Design quests that help learners improve weak questions.
Map quest outcomes to growth feedback.
Integrate outputs into implementation and QA notes.
